name: Himachal Pradesh
stopoverNote: Himachal's legs are long mountain drives — Shimla→Manali and Manali→Dharamshala are each 7–8 hours, so treat those as full travel days with no sightseeing tacked on.

diet.vegetarian: Himachal is very vegetarian-friendly — the festive 'dham' thali, siddu (steamed stuffed bread), madra and babru, plus Tibetan veg momos and thukpa in McLeodganj.
diet.vegan: Hill food leans on ghee and dairy — ask for 'bina ghee, bina makhan'. Tibetan veg momos, thukpa and rice-dal are easily made vegan; McLeodganj has several vegan cafés.
phrases: Bina ghee, bina makhan = no ghee, no butter
Sirf veg momo = only veg momos

cities.name: Shimla
cities.notes: The colonial hill-station capital — the Ridge, Mall Road, Jakhoo temple and the UNESCO Kalka–Shimla toy train.

cities.name: Manali
cities.notes: Adventure hub of the Kullu valley — Solang Valley sports, the Atal Tunnel to Sissu, Hadimba temple and old Manali cafés.

cities.name: Dharamshala
cities.notes: Seat of the Dalai Lama — McLeodganj's Tibetan monasteries, Bhagsu waterfall, Triund trek and cricket's highest stadium.

itinerary.sim: Postpaid SIMs work best in Himachal — prepaid data can be patchy in the higher valleys, and coverage drops beyond the Atal Tunnel. Jio and Airtel are the safest bets.

Shimla.name: Shimla
Shimla.note: Two days covers the Mall/Ridge and a Kufri excursion; the famous toy train arrival can be a day in itself.

days.note: Shimla's core is a pedestrian promenade — the Ridge, Mall and Jakhoo temple are all walkable (Jakhoo is a steep uphill or short ropeway).

activities.name: Jakhoo Temple (Hanuman) by ropeway
activities.tip: Guard your belongings from the monkeys.

days.note: Kufri is ~30min out for valley views; the Kalka–Shimla narrow-gauge ride is best done as a scenic segment, not the full 5–6h haul.

activities.name: Kalka–Shimla toy train scenic ride (UNESCO)
activities.tip: Book on IRCTC well ahead in peak season.

Manali.name: Manali
Manali.note: Two days: one for local temples and old Manali, one for the Solang Valley and Atal Tunnel excursion.

days.note: A gentle arrival-and-acclimatise day — Hadimba temple, old Manali cafés and the riverside are all close together.

activities.name: Hadimba Devi Temple in the cedar forest

days.theme: Solang Valley & Atal Tunnel to Sissu
days.note: Solang is ~13km/30min out for adventure sports; continue through the Atal Tunnel to Sissu for snow and Lahaul views — a full excursion day.

activities.name: Atal Tunnel drive to Sissu & waterfall
activities.tip: Carry warm layers; snow lingers even in summer.

Dharamshala.name: Dharamshala
Dharamshala.note: One day for McLeodganj's monasteries and Bhagsu; add a second for the Triund trek if you have the legs.

days.note: McLeodganj is compact and walkable; Bhagsu waterfall and Dal Lake are short auto rides away.

activities.name: St. John in the Wilderness church

days.theme: Triund trek or Norbulingka & tea trails
days.note: Triund is a ~9km/4–5h ascent with big Dhauladhar views — start early; if you'd rather go easy, do Norbulingka and the Kangra tea gardens instead.

connections.method: Car/taxi or HRTC bus via Mandi (NH-3/205)
Car/taxi or bus via Mandi & Kangra valley

extras: Both inter-town legs are 7–8 hour mountain drives — book them as travel days and don't schedule sightseeing at the far end.
Avoid July–August: the monsoon triggers landslides and road closures across the Kullu and Kangra valleys.
Quoted fees are as of Jul 2026; adventure-sport prices (paragliding, ropeways) are seasonal and negotiable — confirm operator safety and rates first.
Rohtang Pass needs a permit and stays snow-closed part of the year; the toll-free Atal Tunnel gives easy year-round access to Sissu/Lahaul instead.
